baseline.notes: BQR work is implementation history only. No BQR phase is `accepted` under BQC rules. Open findings remain from the 2026-07-16 validation report until closed by BQC evidence.

entries.title: Truthful rebaseline and containment
entries.notes: All five slices (0.1–0.5) implementation_complete. Awaiting independent review of evidence plus the staging stop-control rehearsal steps (docs/operations/bqc0-stop-control-rehearsal.md) before acceptance. Findings close only on accepted evidence per slice.

entries.title: Machine-readable program status
entries.notes: Status schema + CI validator shipped. Not BQC-accepted until independent review of evidence.

entries.title: Correct portal capability taxonomy
entries.notes: STD-P0-01 fixed in mapping + portal server asserts. Evidence: portal-capability-taxonomy.test.ts. Pending independent review for accepted.

entries.title: Restrict test-only capability overrides
entries.notes: SPEC-P0-03 containment portion addressed: BETA_E2E_GLOBAL_CAPABILITIES refuses to take effect outside NODE_ENV=test or explicit BETA_E2E_EXECUTION_IDENTITY — true startup refusal in the worker entry, and fail-closed at first capability evaluation in every process via the lazy getStore() net (proven: built production server 500s with a leaked override; dev server 500s /register; both boot normally with identity or without override). Blocked-capability boot assertion + policy version + tenant-free manifest logged at worker startup. Evidence: capability-boot-guard.test.ts (18 tests). Nitro server/plugins are inert in this build (B0.7 security-headers equally affected — flagged for BQC-6/7), so web has no process-startup hook. Authoritative persisted policy remains BQC-2 scope. Pending independent review for accepted.

entries.title: Confirm operational stop controls
entries.notes: Six stop controls documented and exercised (docs/operations/bqc0-stop-control-rehearsal.md). New: per-capability kill list (BETA_CAPABILITIES_OFF comma form — runbook §11 previously prescribed a value the code silently ignored), capability re-checks in sync/import/publish job handlers, ops:queue pause/resume quarantine (jobs preserved). Boot manifest records kill posture. Temporary boot-time containment; removal slice is BQC-2 persisted policy. Open honestly: staging rehearsal steps (live Redis pause, kill-list under load), per-property stop and DLQ deferred to BQC-2/BQC-3. Pending independent review for accepted.

entries.title: Re-run and pin the baseline
entries.notes: Baseline pinned at 927614bce (migration 0011, lockfile 948a751d) via scripts/bqc/run-baseline.ts — 13/17 gates pass, results verbatim in evidence/baseline-2026-07-17T08-33-43/. Failures recorded with ownership, not excused: dependency-audit 5 known vulns (BQC-7), fallow dead-code/health baseline state (BQC-5), e2e-full 6 local registration-path failures root-caused to node:crypto client leak = STD-P2-01 (BQC-5/BQC-6; CI green on same SHA, timing dimension to isolate). Reproducible via pnpm bqc:run-baseline. Pending independent review for accepted.

entries.title: Correct successful-refetch persistence
entries.notes: PostgreSQL upsert now advances lastFetchedAt/contentExpiresAt/contentHash/source timestamps on every successful fetch; firstFetchedAt preserved by omission. Previously the ON CONFLICT SET dropped all lifecycle fields — the fetch clock never advanced on refetch (content would expire despite successful refreshes). False-green closed from both sides: unit asserts clocks passed to upsert (sync-reviews.test.ts:360), integration proves the real adapter persists them (review.repository.test.ts BQC-1.3 describe). Hash-stable refetch emits no semantic event (BQR-3.4, existing); content-free refresh fact added (SyncReviewsResult.refreshed, logged by the sync job; hash-stable test asserts refreshed:1). Pending independent review for accepted.

entries.title: Remove raw inbox/activity/transport copies
entries.notes: Raw inbox copies eliminated: writes stopped, reads resolve live via the eligibility-enforcing review lookup (isContentEligibleForRead; expired/clock-less fail closed with typed unavailable outcomes); bounded idempotent null-backfill integration-proven. review.created/updated payloads identifier-only (rating removed; metric reads rating at consume time, records nothing when expired). review.updated inbox consumer removed. Activity facts content-free (googleEmail/note-text vectors gone). Notification templates content-free (no raw content to Resend). Registry updated; doc §5 records remaining vectors per owning slice. Pending independent review for accepted.

entries.title: Complete field-and-copy inventory
entries.notes: Verified inventory + executable classification published (bqc1-field-copy-inventory.md). Machine registry (protected-field-registry.ts, 46 entries) guarded by a test that fails when a protected field is introduced without classification (schema columns incl. outbox barrel-excluded tables, outbox event payload fields, job payload scan). Backup/PITR decision recorded as open prerequisite (security/privacy owner) before real data. Worst unmanaged copies ranked for 1.2/1.6/1.7. Pending independent review for accepted.

entries.title: Controlled pilot and AI-readiness handoff
entries.blockedDependency: BQC-0 through BQC-8 accepted + human pilot authorization
